data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: YouTube uses a microservices architecture to ensure scalability and manageability for its various services.
data.technical_spec: Built with microservices, using gRPC for service communication and Kubernetes for orchestration.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: YouTube utilizes a global CDN to efficiently deliver video content to users worldwide.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates edge caching and load balancing to optimize video streaming.

data.title: Cloud-Based Infrastructure
data.description: Leverages Google Cloud Platform to handle storage, processing, and delivery of content.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes a combination of Google Compute Engine and Google Kubernetes Engine.

data.title: Monolithic Legacy Components
data.description: Some legacy components of YouTube still operate in a monolithic fashion.
data.technical_spec: Gradual refactoring of monolithic structures to microservices is ongoing.

data.title: API Gateway
data.description: An API Gateway manages API requests and responses for various YouTube services.
data.technical_spec: Implements RESTful services with OAuth 2.0 for authentication.
